Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

Looks reasonable, but is missing an update to the lfs-fid2path.1 man page. 

Is there already an option "-0" to print the names with NUL termination instead of newline?

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1
> 
> Looks reasonable, but is missing an update to the lfs-fid2path.1 man page. 

I missed this. Will update the man page. Thanks.
 
> 
> Is there already an option "-0" to print the names with NUL termination instead of newline?

Not yet. I am working on getting the -0 option.

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

Sorry, now that I look more closely at the patch, I see that this is doing it the wrong way.  Getting just the filenames from a FID without generating the pathnames is very efficient and should be implemented differently from generating the full pathnames.

parents.subject: LU-16943 tests: fix replay-single/135 under hard failure mode

commit.subject: LU-16605 lfs: Add -n option to fid2path
commit.message:
LU-16605 lfs: Add -n option to fid2path

Add '-n' option to fid2path to allow printing
only the filename of the file instead of the
whole parent pathname.

Test-case sanity/226d added.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: Ieebd39a1655b4e3ad20cdbb4941dbb44882845f4
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/51626
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
